title: Chest in bundle
description: Mod modifies the mechanics of bundle in Minecraft
body:
Chest in bundle - improves the mechanics of the bundle in Minecraft! It has 27 slots for items

Supported languages:
- EN - English
- RU - Русский 
 

Support for mod loaders:
- Forge
